use_cases: Displaying social media posts or tweets in a feed or profile section
Showing user testimonials with verification badges in a social proof section
Rendering comment threads or replies in a discussion interface
Creating a social feed component for community-driven platforms
Displaying activity updates with author attribution and timestamps
ai_summary: An X (Twitter)-style card component with glassmorphism effects featuring a frosted glass background, gradient borders, and support for author information, verification badges, content arrays, and nested replies. The component uses backdrop blur and gradient styling for a modern, semi-transparent aesthetic with full dark mode support. Designed for displaying social media content, testimonials, or activity feeds in a cohesive UI system.
